Field.description: Unique identifier for an input field used in forms and data handling.

SubDescription.description: Extended description section that provides detailed information about a page or section with optional embedded links.

text.description: Main description text. Use \n to add line breaks.

links.description: Array of link definitions that can be embedded within description text using placeholder slugs.

slug.description: Unique identifier used as a placeholder in text. Surround with double square brackets [[slug]] in the text to create the link.

linkText.description: Display text for the link that replaces the slug placeholder.

link.description: URL or path destination for the link.

ValueLabelPair.description: Option item with a display label and corresponding value for form controls.

value.description: The actual value to be stored when this option is selected.

label.description: Text displayed to the user for this option.

anyOf.description: Help text gives context about a fields input, such as how the input will be used. It is displayed directly below an input field.

helpWithLinks.description: Property to provide structured help message

text.description:
Text used for the help message, you can put 
 to add a breakline.

saveValidator.description: Allows you to pass a Javascript function as a string to apply customized validation to form data.

put.description: Define capability when PUT method will be executed. For more information visit Splunk doc : https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/Splunk/latest/Admin/restmapconf#restmap.conf.spec

delete.description: Define capability when DELETE method will be executed. For more information visit Splunk doc : https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/Splunk/latest/Admin/restmapconf#restmap.conf.spec

post.description: Define capability when POST method will be executed. For more information visit Splunk doc : https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/Splunk/latest/Admin/restmapconf#restmap.conf.spec

get.description: Define capability when GET method will be executed. For more information visit Splunk doc : https://docs.splunk.com/Documentation/Splunk/latest/Admin/restmapconf#restmap.conf.spec

Hook.description: It is used to add custom behaviour to forms. Visit the Custom Hook page to learn more.

CustomRow.description: Used to customise the moreInfo Component.

CustomCell.description: Used to modify the default cell values.

WarningMessage.description: It is used to add the custom warning message for each of the modes of ‘create’, ‘edit’, ‘config’, and ‘clone’. The message is displayed on the form.

WarningMessageObject.description: Object for individual warning messages displayed in forms.

message.description: Text content of the warning message. Use \n to add line breaks.

alwaysDisplay.description: When true, the message remains visible even after user input changes. When false, the message disappears after any input modification.

HideForPlatform.description: Defines for which platform element should be hidden from UI perspective.

delimiter.description: It delimits each value of the field with a predefined character.

RangeValue.description: Range of allowed values as a two-element array [min, max].

disableonEdit.description: When the form is in edit mode, the field becomes unable to be edited.

entityLabel.description: Text displayed next to entity field

tooltip.description: Displays a tooltip beside the label.

required.description: To specify whether the field is required or not.

display.description: It chooses whether or not to display the field.

enable.description: The enable property sets whether a field is enabled or not.

requiredWhenVisible.description: It makes the field required on the UI when it appears. It is used only for visibility.

fieldToModify.description: Defines a trigger condition and the resulting field modifications when that condition is met.

fieldValue.description: Trigger value that activates the field modifications. Use [[any_other_value]] to trigger for any value other than explicitly specified ones.

pattern.description: Regex pattern that will be used to match against component value

mode.description: Restricts modifications to a specific form mode. If omitted, modifications apply to all modes.

fieldsToModify.description: Array of field modifications to apply when the trigger condition is met.

color.description: Specify color of displayied text. Accepts all CSS colors

token.description: Declare string that will be swapped into link

linkText.description: Declare string that will put in place of token

link.description: Declare url that will use for redirection

markdownMessage.description: Message that will be displayed as additional information

singleFieldToModify.description: Configuration for modifying a specific field's properties based on another field's value.

fieldId.description: Identifier of the field to be modified when the trigger condition is met.

display.description: Controls whether the target field is visible (true) or hidden (false).

value.description: Sets the value of the target field when the trigger condition is met.

disabled.description: Controls whether the target field is disabled (true) or enabled (false).

required.description: Controls whether the target field is required (true) or optional (false).

label.description: Sets the display label text for the target field.

modifyFieldsOnValue.description: Dynamic field modification system that changes field properties based on the current value of the parent field.

children.description: An array of options with a label and a value.

oneOf.description: An array of options with a label and a value.

IntervalValue.description: Valid interval values: -1, positive numbers (seconds), or CRON expressions for scheduling.

Groups.description: It is used to divide forms into distinct sections, each comprising relevant fields.

isExpandable.description: Used to hide/show fields of the group.

expand.description: Used  to show all fields of the group while opening the form.

label.description: Displays the title of a specific group.

fields.description: specifies the list of fields in a group. All fields must be present in the entity.
